ocr_findings.description: Chapter sidebar text '第13章 データベース' appears broken across multiple lines at the end of the OCR output ('第', '13', '章', 'データベース' as separate lines) rather than being omitted or merged. Cosmetic artifact from vertical sidebar text.

OCR structures each answer as a separate heading (## 解答 / ### 13-N) which adds markdown heading levels not present in the original layout (answers use small badge boxes). Formatting deviation but all content is present.

reviewer_notes: Page is the 解答・解説 (answers and explanations) section for Chapter 13 exam questions 13-1 through 13-6. All answer letters (エ, イ, ア, ウ, ア, ア) and full explanation text are accurately captured. The numbered sub-steps for 13-5 (①5+10=15, ②5-1=4, ③データ1は15になる, ④データ1は4になる) are present and correct. Label 'exam' is appropriate as this is the explanations companion to the exam question pages.
